languages.text: {n}Один за другим солдаты прерывают стрельбы и обращают взоры к вам. Вы начинаете привыкать к череде испуганных и одухотворенных лиц.{/n}
{n}The firing stops as the soldiers turn and look your way. You are getting accustomed to frightened and inspired looks on these faces.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Один за другим солдаты прерывают стрельбы и обращают взоры к вам. Вы начинаете привыкать к череде испуганных и одухотворенных лиц.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}The firing stops as the men turn and look your way. You start growing accustomed to frightened and inspired looks on these faces.{/n}
{n}The firing stops as the soldiers turn and look your way. You are getting accustomed to frightened and inspired looks on these faces.{/n}

{n}The Merovian soldiers immediately notice your interest. One by one, they cease their activities and look back at you. Some grin, while others clap their hands on their training equipment, or brandish their weapons as if inviting you to come and have a go. In all this, you can sense that you are being challenged.{/n}
{n}The firing stops as the men turn and look your way. You start growing accustomed to frightened and inspired looks on these faces.{/n}
{n}The firing stops as the soldiers turn and look your way. You are getting accustomed to frightened and inspired looks on these faces.{/n}

languages.text: {n}メロヴィアン兵士たちは、あなたの興味にすぐに気づいた。彼らは次々と活動を止めて、振り返り、中には笑みを浮かべたり、訓練用の装備を叩いたり、武器を振るったりして、あなたに挑むようにしている兵士もいる。{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The Merovian soldiers immediately notice your interest. One by one, they cease their activities and look back at you. Some grin, while others clap their hands on their training equipment, or brandish their weapons as if inviting you to come and have a go. In all this, you can sense that you are being challenged.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Askerler dönüp sana bakarken atışlar duruyor. Yüzlerindeki korkmuş ve ilham almış bakışlara alışkınsın.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The firing stops as the soldiers turn and look your way. You are getting accustomed to frightened and inspired looks on these faces.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Askerler dönüp sana bakarken atışlar duruyor. Yüzlerindeki korkmuş ve ilham almış bakışlara alışkınsın.{/n}

languages.text: {n}枪声停了下来，士兵们纷纷转头看向你。你已渐渐习惯他们脸上那种惊恐又受鼓舞的神情。{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The firing stops as the soldiers turn and look your way. You are getting accustomed to frightened and inspired looks on these faces.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}枪声停了下来，士兵们纷纷转头看向你。你已渐渐习惯他们脸上那种惊恐又受鼓舞的神情。{/n}

languages.text: {n}Die Soldaten stellen das Feuer ein und schauen in deine Richtung. Langsam gewöhnst du dich an die beflügelten und ängstlichen Blicke dieser Leute.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The firing stops as the soldiers turn and look your way. You are getting accustomed to frightened and inspired looks on these faces.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Die Soldaten stellen das Feuer ein und schauen in deine Richtung. Langsam gewöhnst du dich an die beflügelten und ängstlichen Blicke dieser Leute.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Les soldats cessent de tirer pour se tourner vers vous. Vous commencez à avoir l'habitude de voir ces expressions à la fois inspirées et craintives qui se peignent sur leurs visages lorsqu'ils vous regardent.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The firing stops as the soldiers turn and look your way. You are getting accustomed to frightened and inspired looks on these faces.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Les soldats cessent de tirer pour se tourner vers vous. Vous commencez à avoir l'habitude de voir ces expressions à la fois inspirées et craintives qui se peignent sur leurs visages lorsqu'ils vous regardent.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Los disparos se detienen cuando los soldados se giran para mirarte. Te estás acostumbrando a las miradas de miedo e inspiración en sus rostros.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The firing stops as the soldiers turn and look your way. You are getting accustomed to frightened and inspired looks on these faces.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Los disparos se detienen cuando los soldados se giran para mirarte. Te estás acostumbrando a las miradas de miedo e inspiración en sus rostros.{/n}
